name: Fenugreek Extract
summary: Fenugreek Extract is tracked for Contains saponins and soluble fiber that may affect glucose absorption and endocrine markers with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: Fenugreek Extract is tracked for Contains saponins and soluble fiber that may affect glucose absorption and endocrine markers with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: GI upset, maple odor, hypoglycemia risk; caution anticoagulants and pregnancy.

claimMap.claim: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.
claimMap.notes: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.

sources.title: Effect of fenugreek extract supplement on testosterone levels in male: A meta-analysis of clinical trials.
sources.citation: Author not retrieved (2020). Phytother Res. PMID: 32048383. DOI: 10.1002/ptr.6627.
sources.note: source-backed gap-fill audit only; not a full monograph field extraction

contraindications: Pregnancy due to traditional uterine-stimulant use and reported association with birth defects at supplement doses
Fabaceae or legume family allergy including chickpea or peanut or coriander cross-reactivity
anticoagulant medications such as warfarin due to potentiated bleeding risk
antidiabetic medications such as insulin or sulfonylureas due to additive hypoglycemia risk.
